<?php /* * This file is part of the Symfony package. * * (c) Fabien Potencier <fabien@symfony.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Symfony\Component\ErrorHandler\ErrorEnhancer; interface ErrorEnhancerInterface { /** * Returns an \Throwable instance if the class is able to improve the error, null otherwise. */ public function enhance(\Throwable $error): ?\Throwable; }
